prompt_template_1: Given a convex polygon with {n_sides} sides, its first {n_minus_1} interior angles are: {angle_list}. What is the measure of the remaining interior angle (in degrees)? Return only the angle as your answer. Do not give the units in your answer.
prompt_template_2: A convex polygon has {n_sides} sides. The measures of the first {n_minus_1} interior angles are: {angle_list}. Find the measure of the last interior angle. Return only the angle as your answer. Do not give the units in your answer.
prompt_template_3: Consider a convex {n_sides}-gon whose first {n_minus_1} interior angles are: {angle_list}. Determine the measure of the remaining angle. Return only the angle as your answer. Do not give the units in your answer.
